Search Bar

The command-palette-style search — fast access to everything in Monarch.

Default Search

Matches the Monarch prototype's top-bar search with the ⌘K keyboard shortcut indicator.

Search Bar

Active Search

Search with Results
ESC

Accounts

Deals

↑↓ Navigate ↵ Open ESC Close

Usage Guidelines

• The search bar doubles as a command palette trigger — keyboard-first design

• Results are grouped by entity type (Accounts, Deals, Contacts, Actions)

• Matching text is highlighted with purple background

• First result is auto-selected — pressing Enter opens it immediately

• Keyboard shortcuts shown in the footer reinforce the power-user experience
